title: Revamp /my-profile into 'My Tennis' — sectioned, playful, mobile-first form
description: Replace the thin read-only profile page with a rich sectioned form that lets players describe their tennis across every field in WI-094's taxonomy. Copy and structure celebrate difference and frame the exercise around getting the most out of everyone's tennis together. All fields optional; form saves per-section; form is write-only (see WI-097).
acceptance_criteria: Page hero reads something like 'My Tennis — J.H.' with subtitle along the lines of 'Help us play our best tennis together. Every strength, every quirk, every style makes the team stronger.'
Page is organised into collapsible sections matching the WI-094 taxonomy: Identity & Vibe, Match Types, Playing Style, Partnership, Intensity & Goals, Logistics, Health & Access, Fun, Comms
Every field has warm, playful helper copy — invitational, never interrogating
Match Types section is gender-aware: shows mixed doubles + the same-gender option matching Player.Gender; if gender is Unknown, show all options
Partnership section surfaces a searchable multi-select picker over the active roster at the player's club, for 'partners I click with' and 'partners I'd love to try'
Fun section includes tennis_spirit_animal, walkout_song, celebration_style (radio group), post_match, my_tennis_in_one_line
Mobile-first CSS — works beautifully at 375px and scales up
No stored values are echoed back into form fields on page load (write-only GET — see WI-097 for the full flow)
Page <title> is generic ('My Tennis') — no player name leaked
A visible privacy note explains: 'Your answers stay private — captains see them when building lineups. We don't show them back on this page because the link is shareable. You can update anytime.'
Final field list is cullable during build — this WI delivers a complete implementation of the taxonomy; culling specific fields at review time is expected

files_to_create: templates/players/my_tennis.html — new form template (may replace profile.html)
internal/players/my_tennis.go — GET handler that renders the blank form
files_to_modify: internal/players/profile.go — route /my-profile/{token} to the new handler; keep /my-profile/{token}/history on the existing handler
naming_decision: Feature name: 'My Tennis' (recommended) or 'Your Game'. Warm, short, self-expressive — decide at build time.
copy_direction: Hero: 'Help us play our best tennis — together.'
Section intro example (Fun): 'The bits that make tennis yours. Totally optional, totally you.'
Empty-state: 'No pressure — fill in what feels right, skip what doesn't. Come back any time.'
ui_patterns: Chip multi-select for preferred_days / preferred_times / improvement_focus
Type-ahead picker for partner selects (searching active club roster)
Collapsible sections with per-section 'Save this section' buttons

testing_requirements: All taxonomy fields render and save (E2E in WI-100)
Gender-aware section branch covered (male / female / unknown)
Partner picker finds and selects active roster members

context.user_story: As a player, I want to describe how I play in a way that feels fun and self-expressive, so my captains can build pairings and lineups that bring out the best in me and the team.
design_principles: Positive framing everywhere a player reads it
